Released the base (5ae15481) so lanes weren't stalled; ran the full Node 20+22 matrix that surfaced defects the lanes could not see locally; diagnosed + routed every blocker (Sam 2's two Node-20 kill-9 issues, the root-lockfile drift, and an un-gated centerpiece proof I wired into test:all); resolved all cross-lane barrel conflicts; produced four rolling integrations ending in a fully-green 13-brick comprehensive integration (#138).
